cooperates.cooperate_desc: Fredrinn pairs extremely well with Layla because he functions as a durable frontline tank,fighter who can absorb damage, control enemies, and create space. While he engages and locks targets down, Layla can safely attack from long range and deal continuous damage without being threatened.

counters.counter_desc: Layla pairs well with Terizla because he provides a durable frontline and crowd control. While Terizla engages and slows enemies, Layla can safely deal damage from long range.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Dominance Phase — Layla
Long-Range Domination Phase — Layla reaches peak effectiveness in the late game where her extended attack range, high critical damage, and fast attack speed allow her to safely deal massive sustained damage from the backline.

emblems.emblem_desc: Layla is classified as a Marksman, specializing in long-range physical damage. Her role is to deal consistent basic attack damage from a safe distance, making her strong in poking, zoning, and late game team fights. Even when played as a roamer, her marksman attribute allows her to pressure enemies and support allies through sustained ranged attacks rather than frontline engagement.

equips.equip_desc:
Destroys tanks with sustained DPS
  Keeps Layla safe through extended range
    Provides self-heal through lifesteal
      Strong late-game carry potential

hero.hero_overview: Layla is a marksman used unconventionally as a roamer in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang. Thanks to her extremely long basic attack range, she can safely poke enemies, provide vision, and pressure lanes without risking close combat. As a roam pick, she focuses on zoning enemies, assisting teammates from afar, and scaling into late game damage while supporting fights with ranged harassment.
hero.hero_strength:
Very long attack range for safe poking and zoning
Strong lane pressure even without farm
Can assist fights from a distance without diving
Scales well into late game damage
Good at defending towers and objectives
hero.hero_weakness:
Very squishy and easy to burst if caught
No dash or escape skill
Weak early damage without items
Relies heavily on positioning and map awareness
Vulnerable to assassins and hard engage heroes

emblems.emblem_desc:
Agility: +movement speed; helps reposition; for kiting.

Weapons Master: to increase damage from items; good for scaling to late game. 
(Note: consider tenacity for survivability if enemy team has heavy diving heroes like Lancelot and Ling.)

Quantum Charge: extra damage on basic attacks; small heal; additional movement speed.

equips.equip_desc:
Swift Boots: movement speed.
Buy boots first then complete the item after building magic blade.

Rose Gold Meteor: early game survival.
Buy magic blade after getting the boots. Complete the item after building Windtalker and Berserkers Fury.

Windtalker: attack speed; crit chance; movement speed.
For pushing and DPS.

Berserkers Fury: boosts crit damage.
Scales late game.

Malefic Gun: faster turret pressure; added reach.
For kiting.

Sea Halberd: anti-heal.

Note: buy and sell rose gold meteor with immortality and winters crown for survival.

emblems.emblem_desc: Use this item for late game high damage.

equips.equip_desc: Use Sky Piercer as your first or second item in the early game to snowball by stacking execution damage, and sell it in the late game so you can buy a full-stat item like Sea Halberd or Immortality.

hero.hero_overview: Layla is a classic marksman (MM) hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang (MLBB), known for her extremely long attack range and massive late-game physical damage potential. She is a beginner-friendly hero who teaches core mechanics like positioning and farming, but her lack of mobility makes her challenging in higher-ranked play without strong team support.
hero.hero_strength: Her primary strength lies in her ability to safely deal damage from a distance, but she is highly vulnerable to enemy divers and assassins due to her lack of innate mobility.
hero.hero_weakness: Layla's main weaknesses in MLBB are her lack of mobility/escape skills, making her vulnerable to assassins and divers for example karina, Saber, Hayabusa, and Fredrinn.

spell.spell_desc: Initiation/Engagement: It allows players to surprise enemies by suddenly appearing to initiate a gank or team fight. This is a common tactic with tanks like Tigreal and Khufra, who can use Flicker to position their crowd control abilities effectively.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Yeah layla is getting one tapped. Unless she has wind of nature and uses it before getting ulted. Saber or any hero that can stun you with their combo is a night mare for layla. So really stay back.

counters.counter_desc: Just like saber.

I had to atleast find a character than Layla can 1v1 head on lol. The undead knight can be used to increase layla s range. Just know, in a 1on1 confrontation, layla does not really stand a chance . So always be fat and use your range as your advantage .

dominants.dominant_desc: play. SAFE. Layla can easily be overpowered in the early game. She needs to be babysitter most of the time to comfortably farm.
you can play a bit more agressive . just continue to farm and prioritise getting your items asap.

you can play aggressive, obviously depending on the situation, play safe when enemy had advantage , do not solo anything , if there is a team fight , you need to be present for your damage . Never be alone . Do everything with  your team. Position yourself correctly .

good build if the game is pretty much equal, you don t know when you can get ambush, and the last two can act like as some sort of defence .

hero.hero_overview: Layla can either make or break your game. If used correctly , she is an absolute nightmare in late game , and hits like a truck.
hero.hero_strength: Her long range is what makes her unique , she is amazing at defending base from far without getting close . Her long range combined with her amazing damage makes her a true nightmare to deal weak.
hero.hero_weakness: Squishy + No mobility : She can easily die when caught by the enemy , no dash, no shield, nothing . It is why Layla players are recommended to use flicker .

spell.spell_desc: since she is a hero without any mobility , flicker is the best, to escape and reposition yourself from danger .

counters.counter_desc:
Burst and stun can one shot Layla
Also very hard to catch.
Prime counter of Layla, hard to deal with magic burst and fast ultimate dash.
Any CC set can destroy Layla, because she can't choose purify as battle spell.

Miya can out damage layla with inspire + ultimate combo. Basically at the late game stage, you can't react fast enough to press wind of nature. However, miya is weak in team fights and when map space is not available.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Farm and farm, don't die
Play actively when skill 1 is activated, play passively when it is not activated.
Try to finish enemies using ultimate
Don't go near unknown bushes
Play from the high range and out trade the enemy in damage

You can now give a better impact in teamfights.
However, avoid assassin heroes and dodge mage skills, because you are squishy hero.
You reach the highest range you can have, so utilize it in clashes

Sell boots and buy wind of nature if enemy jungler and marksman is physical type.
Take the orange buff if ally jungler have reached lvl 15 and allows you to have it.

emblems.emblem_desc:
1. Assassin Emblem gives the highest penetration, which is very important to achieve more damage.
2. Fatal is great for any critical built marksman
3. Weapons Master maximizes late game potential
4. Quantum Charge is for early game heal and for more movement speed

Change talent 2 to "Bargain Hunter" in order to buy items faster and achieve damage more earlier. You can give an impact even with small farm deficit. Also having kills will let you completely snowball the game. Note: it loses power near the late game.

If you want to hold the lane better and want to deal more damage when single enemy is near you, then go for "Master Assassin". Note: she can't trigger its effect from middle-long range distance, only short distance.

equips.equip_desc: High movement speed at the early game. Play safe and carry when you have 3-4 items.
Skip the boots and utilize skill 1 movement speed. You can buy boots later at the base. Better lane holding and more damage early on
Physical immunity is handy against unstoppable assassins.
Early damage with Berserker's Fury, but lower attack speed. Burst down the enemy with skills at the early game and later snowball the game.

hero.hero_overview: Layla is a long range marksman hero with high DPS damage. She can carry his team from safe distance and finish heroes with her ultimate. Layla needs proper positioning because she lacks dash-skills and she can be easily ambushed.
hero.hero_strength:
1. Long range
2. High damage with several items
3. High movement speed with skill 1
4. Finisher with her ultimate
5. Can check bushed with skill 1
6. Straightforward gameplay
hero.hero_weakness:
1. No dash skills
2. Squishy stats even at level 15 (hp, def)
3. Lower damage from a short distance
4. Hard to win lane without selling boots (enemy inspire, master assassin)

spell.spell_desc: It gives a dash-skill (which she doesn't have) to escape the enemy. And she can also aggressively close the distance and chase the enemy (not usually recommended).
